charlatan v0.4.1.92
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Contributing to charlatan
  • Changelog

Create fake person names

Source: R/name.R
ch_name.Rd

Create fake person names

ch_name(n = 1, locale = NULL, messy = FALSE)

Arguments

n

(integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer
locale

(character) the locale to use. See PersonProvider$new()$allowed_locales() for locales supported (default: en_US)
messy

(logical) make some messy data. Default: FALSE

See also

PersonProvider

Examples

ch_name()

#> [1] "Dondre Stehr"
ch_name(10)

#>  [1] "Mintie McGlynn"            "Jayson Williamson DDS"    
#>  [3] "Asbury Rau"                "Maximilian Wisozk"        
#>  [5] "Mickey Borer"              "Tanika Johnson"           
#>  [7] "Rush Muller"               "Mrs. Vivienne Corkery DVM"
#>  [9] "Ardis Dooley"              "Lawrence Romaguera-Kunde" 
ch_name(500)

#>   [1] "Desirae Simonis"               "Dr. Reginal Mohr I"           
#>   [3] "Alannah Russel"                "Dr. Lalla Ferry"              
#>   [5] "Aurthur Heller"                "Raina Wehner"                 
#>   [7] "Miss Jennette Nicolas"         "Ali Hettinger Sr."            
#>   [9] "Benjman Cremin IV"             "Mr. Enoch Stroman"            
#>  [11] "Lucia Medhurst DVM"            "Kim Luettgen"                 
#>  [13] "Gorden Frami"                  "Valeria Jast-Schneider"       
#>  [15] "Ryne Rodriguez-Lubowitz"       "Shirley Dickens"              
#>  [17] "Dr. Eino Kuhlman"              "Irving Moen"                  
#>  [19] "Shasta Stamm"                  "Mr. Branch Gerhold"           
#>  [21] "Genevieve Padberg"             "Dr. Lanny Ward MD"            
#>  [23] "Rae Goodwin PhD"               "Cletus Bruen"                 
#>  [25] "Paulo Hoppe"                   "Trenton Rutherford"           
#>  [27] "Mrs. Leana Boyer MD"           "Kanesha O'Hara"               
#>  [29] "Keisha Hahn-Mueller"           "Deirdre Gaylord"              
#>  [31] "Rafael Moore"                  "Kamilah Spencer DVM"          
#>  [33] "Clell Roberts"                 "Sherilyn Cummerata"           
#>  [35] "Devon Hoeger"                  "Ragna Hauck"                  
#>  [37] "Alphonso O'Kon Sr."            "Mr. Edmund Kautzer Sr."       
#>  [39] "Thurman Schuster"              "Tomie Wiegand-D'Amore"        
#>  [41] "Salena Murazik"                "Mariano Turner"               
#>  [43] "Cliffie Bins-Gaylord"          "Clemence Schimmel PhD"        
#>  [45] "Hubbard Conroy"                "Dr. Tomika Beier MD"          
#>  [47] "Holden Dickens"                "Kingston Wiza"                
#>  [49] "Mia Howe"                      "Kyle Russel"                  
#>  [51] "Maralyn Cremin PhD"            "Alfonzo Quitzon"              
#>  [53] "Mrs. Sherilyn Skiles DDS"      "Jered Batz"                   
#>  [55] "Jermaine Gusikowski-Herzog"    "Warren Wilderman"             
#>  [57] "Halle Franecki PhD"            "Isidor Durgan MD"             
#>  [59] "Ms. Anais Parisian DVM"        "Georgette Raynor DDS"         
#>  [61] "Kayson Collier"                "Dr. Gladis Cole"              
#>  [63] "Boyd Von"                      "Zollie Gusikowski Jr."        
#>  [65] "Latrell Bahringer"             "Fed Grimes"                   
#>  [67] "Arnie Borer"                   "Henri Balistreri"             
#>  [69] "Ms. Shaniya Stokes PhD"        "Sydney Lind Sr."              
#>  [71] "Ras Muller DVM"                "Ms. Maymie Little"            
#>  [73] "Michal Tillman-Padberg"        "Needham Pagac"                
#>  [75] "Dr. Leeroy Reinger"            "Mrs. Denice Leannon MD"       
#>  [77] "Hans Cartwright"               "Kalyn Purdy"                  
#>  [79] "Monica Emmerich MD"            "Dr. Brandy Bruen MD"          
#>  [81] "Kathaleen Harvey MD"           "Tre Renner"                   
#>  [83] "Lillard Wolff"                 "Hymen Boehm"                  
#>  [85] "Carla Abshire-Stroman"         "Bettyjane Lakin"              
#>  [87] "Ward Mraz-Hayes"               "Dr. Luanne Nolan MD"          
#>  [89] "Mr. Gregory Effertz"           "Braydon Erdman-Kilback"       
#>  [91] "Marla Brakus"                  "Angel Koepp"                  
#>  [93] "Diana Schamberger"             "Ether Treutel"                
#>  [95] "Ms. Aylin West"                "Reubin Nikolaus"              
#>  [97] "Lilyanna Schinner"             "Maricela Botsford"            
#>  [99] "Lucile Padberg"                "Mr. Basil Mitchell"           
#> [101] "Miss Birdella Funk DDS"        "Kelsi Bergstrom-Turcotte"     
#> [103] "Neely Mertz"                   "Salomon Kihn-Harvey"          
#> [105] "Leatrice Rutherford"           "Christie Konopelski"          
#> [107] "Roel Bosco"                    "Tammie Bauch"                 
#> [109] "Bobbie Feest"                  "Giovani Mann"                 
#> [111] "Mrs. Tiffani Gutmann PhD"      "Margarita Schoen PhD"

#> [115] "Delmas Ernser IV"              "Chelsea Brekke"

#> [499] "Logan Bergstrom"               "Terri Bauch DDS"              

ch_name(locale = "fr_FR", n = 10)

#>  [1] "Philippe Cohen"            "Gérard Moulin d'Oliviér"  
#>  [3] "Olivier Rocher"            "Marine Joly"              
#>  [5] "Simone Lefort"             "Sylvie-Nathalie Dubois"   
#>  [7] "Audrey Jéan"               "Monique Legendre"         
#>  [9] "Monique-Madeleine Monnier" "Michel Rocher"            
ch_name(locale = "fr_CH", n = 10)

#>  [1] "Hugo Cretton"        "Georges Wicht"       "Véronique Boechat"  
#>  [4] "Maxime Comte-Bugnon" "Lisa Gubéran"        "Nathalie Rossellat" 
#>  [7] "Anna Rossellat"      "Jessica Polla"       "Mathieu Matile"     
#> [10] "Emilie Uldry"       
ch_name(locale = "fa_IR", n = 10)

#>  [1] "اميرعباس دادفر"                   "رقيه تنزیلی"                     
#>  [3] "سجاد دایی"                        "جناب آقای دکتر امیرحسین سرخوشیان"
#>  [5] "زینب صیادی"                       "علی رضا روحانی"                  
#>  [7] "مهسا صارمی"                       "جناب آقای محمدپارسا زمانی"       
#>  [9] "جناب آقای دکتر اميرمحمد لاچینی"   "محمد طاها حسنی"                  
ch_name(locale = "fi_FI", n = 10)

#>  [1] "Tuija Purho"      "Ovaska, Janne"    "Toini Alho"       "Laimi Tikkanen"  
#>  [5] "Petäjä, Soilikki" "Paavali Alanen"   "Vilhelmi Korpela" "Aili Aro"        
#>  [9] "Einiö, Miia"      "Klaus Nissinen"
